channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S.-Iran tensions over Strait of Hormuz threaten global shipping lanes
item.description: Acknowledging Iran's control of the strait could set a dangerous precedent for other nations seeking to claim key waterways.

item.title: New $1 Trump coin defies norms and may violate laws, experts say
item.description: A commemorative coin featuring Trump's face for the nation's 250th birthday is among the unusual places his image appears.

item.title: Taco Bell iceberg lettuce tied to cyclospora outbreak across five states
item.description: Federal health officials traced the outbreak to a single Mexican produce supplier used by Taco Bell in five states.

item.title: China hints at restoring U.S. trade benefits for Hong Kong
item.description: The move follows a meeting between Trump and Xi, possibly improving relations ahead of Xi's planned U.S. visit.
